name: groq-coder
description: A2A agent powered by Groq LLM — generates, explains, reviews, and refactors code

skills.name: Generate Code
skills.description: Generate code from a natural language description

skills.name: Explain Code
skills.description: Explain what a given piece of code does

skills.name: Review Code
skills.description: Review code for bugs, style issues, and performance problems

skills.name: Refactor Code
skills.description: Suggest refactored/improved version of given code
